emotional_tone: Calm, focused, encouraging, modern, approachable. No boxy design, purely smooth and rounded.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow the rounded components to breathe.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 or gap-8

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-500 text-white rounded-2xl px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-indigo-600 shadow-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600 rounded-2xl px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-indigo-100 transition-colors
buttons.icon_button: p-3 rounded-full bg-slate-50 hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 transition-colors

inputs.base: bg-slate-50 border-none rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:bg-white transition-all shadow-inner

components.charts: recharts or shadcn charts with customized soft colors, removing standard grid lines to keep it minimal.
components.progress_bars: h-3 rounded-full bg-slate-100 with a rounded-full indicator in primary or success color.
components.tables: border-none, separate border spacing. Rows should have rounded-2xl on hover with bg-slate-50. No vertical borders.
components.tabs: bg-slate-100 rounded-full p-1. Active tab is bg-white rounded-full shadow-sm.

login_background.description: Abstract soft 3d shapes pastel for the login/auth split screen background

student_group.description: Multiracial group of college students studying together for landing page or dashboard welcome section

laptop_student.description: Student studying on laptop for quiz-taking promotional section or loading screens

campus_building.description: University campus building to be used in context-heavy sections like department management

university_seal.description: University seal/logo placeholder for the app's brand identity or admin dashboard

critical_rules: NO hard borders. Everything must be smooth and rounded (rounded-2xl, rounded-3xl).
NO Neo-Brutalist elements. Avoid 1px solid black borders entirely.
Apply 'data-testid' to all interactive and key informational elements.
Do not use generic Inter font for headings. Use Nunito for headings to maintain the soft UI feel.
All cards must have soft ambient shadows (shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]).
Use Phosphor icons in duotone for an elegant, approachable aesthetic.
